ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rental_records" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "instant" INTEGER /* Sequential record identifier */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1: spring, 2: summer, 3: fall, 4: winter) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record (0: 2011, 1: 2012) */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year (1 to 12) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the day is a holiday (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0: Sunday, 1: Monday, ..., 6: Saturday) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1: clear, 2: misty, 3: light rain, 4: heavy rain) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Normalized temperature (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Normalized feeling temperature (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Normalized humidity (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Normalized windspeed (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "casual_users" INTEGER /* Number of casual users (unregistered users) */,
  "registered_users" INTEGER /* Number of registered users */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of users */,
  "peak_hours" INTEGER /* Whether the rental occurred during peak hours (7am-9am or 4pm-6pm) */,
  "is_holiday_season" INTEGER /* Whether the rental occurred during the holiday season (Dec 15 - Jan 15) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_records" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1: spring, 2: summer, 3: fall, 4: winter) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1: clear, 2: misty, 3: light rain, 4: heavy rain) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Normalized temperature (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Normalized feeling temperature (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Normalized humidity (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Normalized windspeed (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount (in mm) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_records" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (casual or registered) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of user registration */,
  "last_rental_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last rental */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals by the user */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered by the user */,
  "average_rental_duration" REAL /* Average duration of rentals by the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (male/female/other) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the user (high school/college/university) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_records" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bikes it can hold) */,
  "last_check_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last check-in */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of available bikes at the station */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* Nearby landmarks or points of interest */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., standard, premium, event-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental transaction */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike was rented */,
  "rental_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the rental start time */,
  "rental_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the rental end time */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance covered during the rental in kilometers */,
  "route_taken" TEXT /* Route taken by the user (start and end points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_records ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_transactions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES station_records ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being maintained */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES station_records ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_records" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike is located */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., standard, electric, tandem) */,
  "bike_condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the bike (e.g., good, damaged) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES station_records ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "target_user_type" TEXT /* Type of users targeted by the promotion (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)
